Details:
Other techniques like Irradiation with X-Rays or γ- rays and Ultrasonic treatment was effective in degradation of diazinon for the conditions presented. 
10 mg/l of diazinon in lab water was almost completely degraded (91 percent)  by 4.79 kGy/h of Cobalt 60 γ- rays in 1.3 hours.  Lower percent removal was observed in groundwater than in lab water by γ- ray irradiation.  80 percent of 40 mg/l diazinon is degraded by 50 nmGy/s white X-rays in 120 minutes.
70 percent removal was achieved using 1.7 Mhz wave length of ultrasound in 10 minutes. It must be noted that concentrations in the range of 1000 mg/l are not seen drinking water sources.
